headline.title: 特朗普取消对伊朗打击并宣称和平协议，全球股市大涨
headline.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布取消对伊朗的新一轮打击，声称德黑兰已批准和平协议。消息传出后，华尔街与亚洲股市大幅反弹，国际油价显著下跌。市场押注持续100多天的美伊冲突即将结束。
headline.title_en: Stock markets surge as Trump calls off strikes on Iran, touts peace deal
headline.summary_en: President Trump cancels new strikes on Iran, claiming Tehran has approved a peace deal. Wall Street and Asian markets surge, oil prices tumble as investors bet on a diplomatic end to the 100-day conflict.
headline.reason: 美伊和平曙光主导全球风险情绪，股市大涨，同时牵动能源价格与地缘格局，是本日最具跨领域影响力的事件。
headline.reason_en: The prospect of US-Iran peace drives global risk-on mood, lifting equities and lowering oil prices; it is the most cross-cutting event of the day.
